title: Amtech E0100 No. 4 Smoothing Plane
features: DURABLE: This traditional style No. 4 smoothing plane has a strong cast iron steel body and a 50mm (2") carbon steel blade
EASY TO USE: With comfortable, ergonomic plastic handles for comfort and control, it is ideal for general woodworking applications
SIZE CAPACITY: 50 mm range ideal for household and trade applications
PRECISION PERFORMANCE: Provides smooth and accurate results
PLUMBING APPLICATIONS: Essential for household and trade pipework
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1x Plane See more
